subject: Recurring Event Extrapolation Logic — For Your Implementation
body:
Harvey,

Ybotman asked me to share our recurring event extrapolation logic. It's **pure keyword/pattern matching** — no LLM needed.

## Overview

Detects weekly/monthly patterns in title + description, then generates future instances.

## Expansion Windows

| Pattern | Category | Weeks/Months |
|---------|----------|-------------|
| Weekly | MILONGA | 8 weeks |
| Weekly | PRACTICA | 8 weeks |
| Weekly | CLASS | 5 weeks |
| Monthly | All | 2 months |

## Detection Logic

### 1. NEGATIVE Patterns (Skip These — DO NOT extrapolate)

```javascript
// Skip these — unpredictable or one-off
/5th (sunday|monday|...)/i           // 5th week doesn't always exist
/fifth (sunday|monday|...)/i
/last (sunday|monday|...)/i          // Requires per-month calculation
/bi-?weekly/i                        // Need to track which week
/every other (week|day)/i
/this week only/i
/special (edition|event|evening)/i
/one-?time (only|event)/i
/inaugural|grand opening|first ever|last ever|final/i
```

### 2. WEEKLY Positive Patterns (HIGH confidence)

```javascript
/every (sunday|monday|...)/i              // "every Thursday"
/(sunday|...)s (at|from|starting)/i       // "Fridays at 8pm"
/weekly (milonga|practica|tango)/i        // "weekly milonga"
/(sunday|...) (night|evening) (tango|milonga)/i  // "Friday night tango"
/every week/i
/each (sunday|monday|...)/i
```

### 3. WEEKLY Positive Patterns (MEDIUM confidence)

```javascript
/^(sunday|monday|...)/i               // Title starts with day name
/(sunday|...) (tango|milonga|practica)/i  // "Tuesday Tango"
```

### 4. MONTHLY Patterns

```javascript
/(1st|2nd|3rd|4th|first|second|third|fourth) (sunday|...)/i
// e.g., "4th Sundays", "1st Fridays", "2nd & 4th Saturdays"
```

## Day-of-Week Validation

**Critical:** If text says "every Thursday" but `start_dt` is a Friday → SKIP (conflict).

```javascript
const textDay = extractDayFromPattern(title + description);
const actualDay = new Date(start_dt).getUTCDay();
if (textDay !== null && textDay !== actualDay) {
  return { skip: true, reason: 'day conflict' };
}
```

## Corroborating Evidence (Fallback)

If no text patterns found, check historical data:
- Same title + same venue + same weekday
- 3+ instances = MEDIUM confidence weekly
- 4+ instances = HIGH confidence weekly

```sql
SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt, strftime('%w', start_dt) as dow
FROM events
WHERE title LIKE ? AND venue_name = ?
GROUP BY dow
HAVING cnt >= 3
```

## Date Generation

### Weekly
```javascript
function generateFutureWeeklyDates(dayOfWeek, weeksAhead) {
  const dates = [];
  const today = new Date();
  let daysUntilNext = dayOfWeek - today.getUTCDay();
  if (daysUntilNext <= 0) daysUntilNext += 7;
  
  const nextDate = addDays(today, daysUntilNext);
  for (let i = 0; i < weeksAhead; i++) {
    dates.push(addDays(nextDate, i * 7));
  }
  return dates;
}
```

### Monthly (Nth weekday)
```javascript
function getNthDayOfMonth(year, month, dayOfWeek, n) {
  // n = 1 (1st), 2 (2nd), 3 (3rd), 4 (4th)
  const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1);
  let daysUntilFirst = dayOfWeek - firstDay.getDay();
  if (daysUntilFirst < 0) daysUntilFirst += 7;
  
  const nthDay = 1 + daysUntilFirst + (n - 1) * 7;
  // Validate day exists in month
  const result = new Date(year, month, nthDay);
  return result.getMonth() === month ? result : null;
}
```

## Deduplication

Use fingerprint: `hash(title + date + venueKey)`

Before inserting extrapolated event, check if fingerprint already exists (from FB scrape or previous extrapolation).

## Time Preservation

Copy time-of-day from source event to extrapolated events:
```javascript
const sourceTime = new Date(source.start_dt);
const newDate = new Date(targetDateStr);
newDate.setUTCHours(sourceTime.getUTCHours());
newDate.setUTCMinutes(sourceTime.getUTCMinutes());
```

## Full Source Code

See: `fb-conditioner/scripts/lib/extrapolate.ts` (~720 lines)

Key functions:
- `detectRecurrence(title, description, startDt)` → detection result
- `extrapolateRecurring(flags)` → generates future events
- `generateFutureWeeklyDates(dayOfWeek, weeksAhead)` → date list
- `generateFutureMonthlyDates(dayOfWeek, ordinals, monthsAhead)` → date list

## Usage

```bash
# Dry run
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/lib/extrapolate.ts --env=test --dry-run --verbose

# Actually expand
node --experimental-strip-types scripts/lib/extrapolate.ts --env=prod --weeks=8 --verbose
```

Let me know if you need the full file or have questions!

— Booker
